system.benefit: Ignore armor and auto-confirm RF on 10
system.description:
The Battle-Brother can focus his intent on where it is likely to do most Damage to his enemy and then strike the target down with a single shot. The Battle-Brother may declare that he is using this Talent before he makes a single ranged attack. If the attack hits, it ignores an additional point of armour per Degree of Success. If a 10 is rolled for Damage, it automatically triggers Righteous Fury without the need for another Ballistic Skill Test (see Righteous Fury on page 245 in Chapter VIII: Combat).

This Talent may not be used in conjunction with Blast weapons, Semi or Full-Auto Bursts, or Flame weapons. It may, however, be used in conjunction with accurate weapons and in conjunction with making Called Shots and taking Aim Actions.
